title: HTI Centipede Cyril: Assorted
description: Squish him, stretch him and fling him! Centipede Cyril is bound to bring joy to fidgety hands. With his long stretchy body and soft spikes, once you pick him up you won’t want to put him down. Product Information:• Centipede Cyril• Fidget Toy• Colour: Assorted• Age: 5+ Please note: Colours and designs may vary, only one supplied.
